## Type of change

- [ ] New case study
- [ ] Framework revision
- [ ] Agent / tools code
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / repo maintenance
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] `bash scripts/check-no-internal.sh` reports zero hits
- [ ] `pytest tests/` passes (if you touched Python)
- [ ] `ruff check .` clean (if you touched Python)
- [ ] If new case study: framework scores cite ≥ 1 source per dimension; ≥ 2 for any "+N% gain" / "fully supported" claim
- [ ] If framework change: affected case studies have been re-scored to match
- [ ] No proprietary, internal, or NDA-bound information included
- [ ] No hardcoded hostnames / IPs / paths (use `${...}` or `~/...`)
- [ ] No tokens / credentials in any file
